message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series expanding ops (5 cases)

Append 5 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.expanding().{mean,
sum,min,max,count}() reductions:

- expanding_mean_default
- expanding_sum_default
- expanding_min_default (varying values to check tracking)
- expanding_max_default (varying values to check tracking)
- expanding_count_with_nulls (verifies null skipping)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs series.expanding(min_periods).{op}(), and asserts parity
via compare_series_expected.

[bd-frankenpandas-b93a1]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
